description_long: This is a wooden bunk bed with an integrated staircase and side ladder, designed for two sleeping spaces, one above the other. The upper bunk is surrounded by sturdy vertical slats forming a safety rail, while the lower bunk is open on the front and sides. The right side features a staircase with built-in drawers for storage, and the left side has a slanted ladder for easy access to the top bunk. The bed frame is constructed from light-colored wood with a natural finish, giving it a warm and inviting appearance. The overall design is robust and functional, suitable for shared bedrooms or urban living spaces where maximizing vertical space is important.
description: A light wood bunk bed with a staircase featuring storage drawers and a slanted ladder, designed for two sleepers and efficient space use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bunks, the slanted ladder on the left, and the staircase with drawers on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase with visible steps and storage drawers, and the safety rails of the upper bunk.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the bed, the back of the staircase, and the slatted safety rails on both bunks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the slanted ladder and the side profile of the staircase and upper bunk rails.
